---
title: "FinalProject"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---
```{r question geartypes}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
geartypes<-read.csv("/cloud/project/fish-catch-gear-type.csv")
geartypesdf<-data.frame(geartypes)
wrldgear<-filter(geartypesdf,Entity=="World")
wide_data<- data.frame(Year=wrldgear$Year,Unknown.Gear=wrldgear$Unknown.gear,other.gear=wrldgear$Other.gear,longline=wrldgear$Longline,gillnet=wrldgear$Gillnet,small.scale=wrldgear$Small.scale,purse.seine=wrldgear$Purse.seine,pelagic.trawl=wrldgear$Pelagic.trawl,bottom.trawl=wrldgear$Bottom.trawl)
wrldgear.long<-wide_data %>%
  pivot_longer(cols=c(Unknown.Gear, other.gear,longline,gillnet,small.scale,purse.seine,pelagic.trawl,bottom.trawl),names_to = "Gear.Type",values_to = "Count")
 ggplot(wrldgear.long,aes(x=Year,y=Count,fill=Gear.Type)) + geom_area(position= "fill")+labs(title="Fish Catch by Gear Type over time", y= "Proportions", fill= " Gear Type")+xlim(1974,2018)+ scale_fill_discrete(name="Gear Type", labels= c("Bottom Trawl", "Gillnet"," Longline", "Other Gear", "Pelagic Trawl", "Purse Seine", "Small Scale", "Unknown Gear"))
```

```{r}
fish.stock.sustainable<- read.csv("/cloud/project/fish-stocks-within-sustainable-levels.csv")
wrldstocks<- data.frame(fish.stock.sustainable)
wrldstocks<- filter(wrldstocks, Entity == "World")
colnames(wrldstocks)<- c( "Entity", "Code", "Year", "Proportion1", "Proportion")
wrldstocks$Proportion<- wrldstocks$Proportion1/100
wrldstocks<- wrldstocks[,-c(1,2,4)]
fractions<-wide_data[25:69,]%>%
  rowwise()%>%
  mutate(across(Unknown.Gear:bottom.trawl, ~./sum(c_across(Unknown.Gear:bottom.trawl))))%>%
  ungroup()
wrldstocks2<- wrldstocks[1:45,]
fractions$Biologically.Sustainable<- wrldstocks2$Proportion
colnames(fractions)<- c("Year", "Unknown Gear", "Other Gear", "Longline", "Gillnet","Small Scale", "Purse Seine", "Pelagic Trawl", "Bottom Trawl", "Biologically Sustainable")
```

```{r}
response_var<-names(fractions)[ncol(fractions)]
fractions.for.plot<- fractions %>%
  pivot_longer( cols= -c( Year, all_of(response_var)), names_to = "Predictor", values_to= "Value") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x= Value, y= .data[[response_var]])) + geom_point(alpha= 0.5)+geom_smooth(method="lm", se= TRUE, color="black")+facet_wrap(~Predictor, scales= "free_x")+ labs(x= "Proportion of Fish Caught Using Specified Gear", y= response_var, title= "Regression of Each Gear Type Against Proportion of Fish Stocks Classified as Biologically Sustainable")+ theme(plot.title = element_text(size=7.5), plot.margin = margin(15,5,10,10 ), axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, vjust=1, hjust=1, size=5))
print(fractions.for.plot)
```

```{r }
library(countries)
 fish.stock.sustainable.2018<- filter(data.frame(fish.stock.sustainable), Year == "2018")
 fish.stock.sustainable.2018<- fish.stock.sustainable.2018[-55,-c(3,5)]
 colnames(fish.stock.sustainable.2018)<- c("Entity", "Code", "Proportion Biologically Sustaianble")
quick_map(data= fish.stock.sustainable.2018, plot_col = "Proportion Biologically Sustaianble", theme= "Blues")
```

```{r}
gear.2018<- filter(geartypesdf, Year == "2018")
gear.2018<-gear.2018[,-3]
colnames(gear.2018)<- c("Entity", "Code", " Unknown Gear", "Other Gear", "Longline", "Gillnet", "Small Scale", " Purse Seine", "Pelagic Trawl", "Bottom Trawl" )
gear.max<- apply(gear.2018, 1, function(x) colnames(gear.2018)[which.max(x)])
gear.max.df<- data.frame(gear.max)
gear.max.df$country<- gear.2018$Entity
gear.max.df$Code<- gear.2018$Code
colnames(gear.max.df)<- c("Most Used Gear", "Country", "Code")
quick_map(data= gear.max.df, plot_col= "Most Used Gear", theme= "Greens")

``` 

```{r}
fish.stock.sustainable.2021<- filter(data.frame(fish.stock.sustainable), Year == "2021")
 fish.stock.sustainable.2021<- fish.stock.sustainable.2021[-55,-c(3,5)]
 colnames(fish.stock.sustainable.2021)<- c("Entity", "Code", "Proportion Biologically Sustaianble")
quick_map(data= fish.stock.sustainable.2021, plot_col = "Proportion Biologically Sustaianble", theme= "Blues")
```

```{r}
fish.caught.df<- filter(geartypesdf, Year == "2018")
fish.caught.df<- fish.caught.df[, -3]
fish.caught.df$total.catch<- rowSums(fish.caught.df[,c("Unknown.gear", "Other.gear", "Longline", "Gillnet", "Purse.seine", "Small.scale", "Pelagic.trawl", "Bottom.trawl")], na.rm= TRUE)
fish.caught.total<- fish.caught.df[,-c(3:10)]
colnames(fish.caught.total)<- c("Entity", "Code", "Total Catch")
fish.caught.total<- fish.caught.total[-197,]
fish.caught.total<- fish.caught.total %>%
  arrange(desc(`Total Catch`))
head(fish.caught.total)
```

```{r statistical test}
options(scipen = 0, digits= 7)
gear.cols<- c("Unknown Gear", "Other Gear", "Longline", "Gillnet", "Small Scale", "Purse Seine", "Pelagic Trawl", "Bottom Trawl")
results<- do.call(rbind, lapply(gear.cols, function(gear){
  test<- cor.test(fractions[[gear]], fractions$`Biologically Sustainable`)
   data.frame(
    Gear    = gear,
    r       = round(test$estimate, 3),
    t       = round(test$statistic, 3),
    df      = test$parameter,
    p.value = test$p.value, 4
   )
}))
rownames(results)<- c("Unknown Gear", "Other Gear", "Longline", "Gillnet", "Small Scale", "Purse Seine", "Pelagic Trawl", "Bottom Trawl")
results<- results[,-c(1,6)]
results$Significant<- ifelse(results$p.value<0.05, "Yes", "No")
results$p.value<- format(results$p.value, scientific = TRUE, digits= 3)
```
